project_type: Android app (Sketchware Pro IDE fork) with Gradle build
build_system: Gradle with version catalog (gradle/libs.versions.toml). Uses google-services plugin requiring google-services.json. The app uses sora-editor 0.23.5 for code editing.
test_framework: No unit tests in this project. Validation is done via Gradle assembleRelease.
verification_instructions: Run `gradle assembleRelease` from the project root. It should complete without errors.
setup_instructions: Java 17 must be active (mise use java@17). Then run gradle assembleRelease from project root.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Java 17 available via mise. Gradle 8.14 available.
contribution_requirements: New code goes in pro.sketchware.codeproject package. Use Java, not Kotlin, for new source files. Do not break existing drag-and-drop functionality.
key_patterns: - CodeProjectActivity uses ViewBinding (ActivityCodeProjectBinding). - Editor is sora-editor CodeEditor widget. - Language support via JavaLanguage (built-in) and TextMate grammars. - EditorUtils provides loadJavaConfig/loadXmlConfig helpers. - CodeEditorLanguages has SCOPE_NAME_KOTLIN already defined for TextMate. - Kotlin compilation exists in mod.hey.studios.compiler.kotlin using K2JVMCompiler. - CodeProjectBuilder uses ECJ for Java compilation, D8 for dexing. - File explorer uses RecyclerView with FileExplorerAdapter. - The activity_code_project.xml layout has DrawerLayout with toolbar+editor in main content and NavigationView with file list in drawer.
directory_structure: - app/src/main/java/pro/sketchware/codeproject/ - Code project IDE feature (ui, build, model, template subpackages). - app/src/main/java/mod/jbk/code/ - Editor language/color scheme helpers. - app/src/main/java/mod/hey/studios/compiler/kotlin/ - Existing Kotlin compiler bridge. - app/src/main/res/layout/ - Layout XMLs. - app/src/main/res/menu/ - Menu XMLs. - app/src/main/assets/textmate/ - TextMate grammar files for syntax highlighting.
